title: Copper's Additional Features
description: A mod that adds new blocks and items to Minecraft.
body:
**Taking a break on this mod's development for now, full update may be out in the future.**

A mod attempting to add new features to Minecraft without going too far from the Vanilla game.

**Current Features**

 - A new decorative block found in Savannas, Strata.
 - Five new metals, Runite, Uranium, Pewter, Steel and Lead.
 - A new weapon, the Flintlock Cannon.
 - A new decorative block found in The End, Tephrite.
 - More complex early game progression.
 - A new mud block, Polished Mud.

Please credit me if you wanna include this mod somewhere and don't distribute this mod as yours.

Enjoy :)
